source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/07_(CYAN) GT1717C, GT1717CP/90_규격 Test report/1. 시험소 제출서류/04. 회로도_패턴도_부품배치도_블록다이어그램/Cyan(GT1717C,GT1717CP))_INSULATION Diagram.pptx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Insulation diagram for CYAN GT1717C/GT1717CP showing PoE power input, Ethernet connections, enclosure parts, boards, and voltage/current ratings.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Test-laboratory submission material showing insulation and power architecture for the digital flat panel x-ray detector.
keyPoints: The diagram references an IEC 62368-1:2020 certified PoE injector and IEEE Ethernet standards.
The detector is described as powered only through the Ethernet PoE port, with no direct mains connection provided.
The diagram identifies mains-side AC input to the PoE injector and secondary DC outputs including DC51V/0.59A and DC12V/2.5A.

concepts.name: Power over Ethernet
concepts.evidence: This equipment is powered only through Ethernet (PoE) port

concepts.name: No direct mains connection
concepts.evidence: No direct mains connection is provided.

evidence.claim: The document is an insulation diagram.
The source relates to CYAN product models GT1717C and GT1717CP.
evidence.evidenceText: sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/07_(CYAN) GT1717C, GT1717CP/90_규격 Test report/

evidence.claim: The diagram references an IEC 62368-1:2020 certified PoE injector.
The diagram references IEEE 802.3, IEEE 802.3u, and IEEE 802.3ad.
The equipment is powered only through the Ethernet PoE port.
evidence.evidenceText: This equipment is powered only through Ethernet (PoE) port

evidence.claim: No direct mains connection is provided to the equipment.
evidence.evidenceText: No direct mains connection is provided.

evidence.claim: The mains part is rated AC100 to 240V and 0.6A maximum.
The secondary output is rated DC51V and 0.59A maximum.
The diagram identifies DC 12V/2.5A and DC 51V/0.59A power values.
The detector includes Main and ROIC board, Gate board, Indicator board, and bottom panel sheet as part of the enclosure.
evidence.evidenceText: Digital flat panel x-ray detector Main&ROIC board, Gate board, Indicator board bottom panel sheet(part of enclosure)
evidence.pageTarget: Digital flat panel x-ray detector components

evidence.claim: The front panel sheet is identified as an applied part.
The diagram identifies an unearthed metal enclosure and an insulating enclosure.
evidence.evidenceText: Unearthed metal enclosure front panel sheet(applied part) insulating enclosure
